inherited_failure: unmanaged 90d top-2 2021-2022 base return +243.96%, max drawdown -85.70%, DOES_NOT_SUPPORT
question: Can ex-ante 56-day realized-volatility scaling to a 20% annual target make the fixed mature-alt spot top-2 momentum rule profitable and drawdown-bounded in untouched evaluation and confirmation periods?
development_gate: data PASS; primary base/stress total >0; primary max drawdown >-35% and improves at least 30 percentage points vs unmanaged; at least 4/6 robustness base totals >0; turnover <=30
evaluation_gate: primary base/stress total >0; at least one positive year; max drawdown >-35% and below buy-and-hold; at least 4/6 robustness base totals >=0
confirmation_gate: primary base/stress total >=0; max drawdown >-35% and below buy-and-hold; at least 4/6 robustness base totals >=0
holdout_release_rule: Use exposed development only after checkpoint; fetch evaluation only after development implementation gate passes; fetch confirmation only after fixed evaluation passes
allowed_fixes: implementation defects that do not change universe, signals, risk formula, periods, costs, benchmark or gates
